evals.name: route-handler-contract
evals.prompt: Add an Elysia POST route with params, body, typed 201 and 404 responses, and explain the smallest test.

evals.name: validation-openapi
evals.prompt: Wire Elysia validation and OpenAPI docs for a sign-in route using reference models and route detail metadata.
evals.expected_output: mentions schema reuse plus OpenAPI detail.

evals.name: plugin-lifecycle-context
evals.prompt: Design an Elysia auth plugin that adds context, uses a lifecycle hook, and avoids duplicate plugin execution.
evals.expected_output: covers explicit dependency, lifecycle order, and dedup name.

evals.name: eden-testing-client
evals.prompt: Add an Eden Treaty client and a unit test for an exported Elysia app type.
evals.expected_output: uses exported App type with Treaty or app.handle.

evals.name: when-to-delegate-drizzle
evals.prompt: This is a routing-only answer. The request is to choose a Drizzle migration strategy for a production Elysia app. Decide whether to handle it here or delegate.

evals.name: version-lane
evals.prompt: Choose which Elysia version lane to use for a new project that will be deployed to Bun and needs long-term stability.
evals.expected_output: explains Elysia version lane selection criteria.

evals.name: runtime-deployment-surface
evals.prompt: Choose the appropriate runtime and deployment surface for an Elysia API that needs edge support.
